description: The TailwindTraders backlog is disorganized, with several User Stories nested under incorrect Features or orphaned without parents. Reorganize the backlog by reparenting 'Implement full-text product search', 'Add search filters by category and price', and 'Search autocomplete suggestions' to the 'Search & Discovery' Feature. Reparent 'Password reset via email' and 'User profile editing page' to the 'User Account Management' Feature. Reparent 'Apply discount codes at checkout', 'One-click purchase for saved payment methods', and 'Guest checkout without account creation' to the 'Shopping Cart & Checkout' Feature. Ensure all changes are saved.

Shopping Cart & Checkout: One-click purchase for saved payment methods
Search & Discovery: Add search filters by category and price
